phrases.usage: The standard way to start any talk.
phrases.example: Hello! Can I get a coffee?

phrases.usage: Use this from sunrise until noon.
phrases.example: Good morning, how are you today?

phrases.usage: Use this to get the barista's attention.
phrases.example: Excuse me, where do I pick up my drink?

phrases.usage: Say this when you receive your drink.
phrases.example: Thank you! Have a great day.

phrases.usage: A clear way to end the talk.

keyVocabulary.definition: The person who makes the coffee.
The list of drinks and food.
To ask for food or drink.
